name: Applesauce Cake (Dried Apples)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fried apples; pureed in blender with 1/2 c. warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter and honey until well combined.
2. Add the eggs, warm water, and pureed apples to the butter and honey mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until well combined.
5. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
6. Butter and brown paper-lined 3/4 x 8 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pans.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
8. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
9. Cut into slices and serve with a spoonful of sweetened whipped cream on top.
